title: Diva
description: This is a Vue 2 Weblate demo
para: Football (or soccer) is the world's most popular sport, featuring two teams of 11 players aiming to score by moving a ball into the opposing goal without using hands or arms, played by millions globally. Major competitions include the FIFA World Cup, with the 2026 edition set for 48 teams, and elite league club matches.
info: Vue  is an open-source JavaScript framework used to build interactive user interfaces (UIs) and single-page applications (SPAs).Created by Evan You in 2014, it is widely known as the 'Progressive Framework' because it is designed to be incrementally adoptable. You can use it as a small library to add a bit of interactivity to an existing page or as a full-featured framework to power massive, complex applications.
